vnglish.name: Vnglish
vnglish.deleteAllConfirmText: Once gone, it's fucking gone. Don’t come crying like a bitch!
vnglish.deleteAllEmptyMessage: Deleting... what exactly? Your imaginary bullshit? At least write something first, dumbass!
vnglish.deletePostConfirmText: This shit ain't coming back, just like your last relationship!
vnglish.noPostsMessage: Nothing here. Start typing before you bitch about it!
vnglish.noResultsMessage: Nothing, loser. Either you typed like an idiot or your notes are garbage.
vnglish.exportEmptyMessage: Exporting what? Empty fucking space? Try writing before acting smart!
vnglish.importErrorInvalidFile: Wrong fucking file, dipshit. We take JSON, not your mom’s love letters!
vnglish.importErrorNotThoughts: This ain’t from Thoughts. What is this, some shady ass JSON from the dark web?
vnglish.importErrorInvalidFormat: Format’s fucked. Did a toddler make this JSON?
vnglish.importErrorInvalidJSON: Dude, even JSON is rejecting your bullshit. Fix it!
vnglish.importConfirmText: Got old notes. Merge ‘em or fuck ‘em?
vnglish.importSuccessMerge: Merged! Your old shit now mixed with new shit!
vnglish.importSuccessReplace: Replaced! Hope you didn’t need that garbage.
vnglish.importSuccessFirst: Imported! Finally putting some garbage in here!
vnglish.footerOfflineText: Install Thoughts and fuck off from the internet:
vnglish.footerAndroidGuide: Android: Menu (⋮) > Slam It On Your Home screen.
vnglish.footerIOSGuide: iOS: Share (⬆) > Stick This On Your Home Screen.
vnglish.footerPrivacy: Your notes, your bullshit. We don’t snoop.
vnglish.discardConfirmText: You sure? Ain’t no undo, dumbfuck!
vnglish.deleteLanguageConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete
vnglish.charLimitMessage: Whoa there! Only {count} characters are allowed. Extra characters? Poof—they’re gone!
vnglish.webStoreNote: Download your favorite language from the site and upload it to the app using the Upload Language option.
